title: sorbus tomentosa
intro: Sorbus tomentosa, also known as the downy rowan or downy whitebeam, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is native to parts of Asia and Europe, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Sorbus tomentosa include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
